title: Application for Canadian Citizenship – Canadian Armed Forces - Canada.ca
content:
## Application for Canadian Citizenship – Canadian Armed Forces
Get help to open an application form or to fill one out in the Help Centre .
This application package includes:
- Document Checklist (CIT 0172) (opens in new tab)
- Application for Canadian Citizenship – Adults – Canadian Armed Forces under Subsection 5(1) (CIT 0532) (opens in new tab)
- Citizenship photo specifications
- Use of a Representative (IMM 5476) (opens in new tab)
Use this application if you are 18 years of age or older, and you want to apply for Canadian citizenship as a member of the Canadian Armed Forces .
- Request form for a Change of Sex or Gender Identifier (IRM 0002) (opens in new tab)
Note: If you were released other than honourably from the Canadian Armed Forces, you are not eligible to apply under the Canadian Armed Forces application form.
- Read the Instruction Guide and download the application forms.
- Fill out, sign and date your application forms.
- Mail your completed application to the Case Processing Centre in Sydney, Nova Scotia .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
